manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Cooling Tower Design Wetbulb and Approach
manual_entries.summary: Cooling tower design information should define the design wetbulb condition, tower approach, and basin level-control thresholds used by the waterside economizer and condenser-water sequence.

zh.title: ASHRAE 冷却塔设计湿球与逼近温差
zh.summary: 冷却塔设计信息应定义用于水侧经济器和冷却水控制序列的设计湿球条件、冷却塔逼近温差以及水盆液位控制阈值。

structured_payload.measurement_context: 冷却塔设计湿球温度、设计逼近温差及相关液位控制阈值
design cooling tower wetbulb temperature and design cooling tower approach with associated tower level thresholds

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Waterside economizer design information defines design cooling tower wetbulb temperature, design cooling tower approach, and tower level-control thresholds.
chunk.text_excerpt: design cooling tower wetbulb temperature and design tower approach

evidence.evidence_text: Waterside economizer design information defines DTWB as design cooling tower wetbulb temperature, DACT as design cooling tower approach, and also defines tower level-control thresholds such as high alarm, low alarm, minimum fill, and maximum fill.
